allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('terms.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('OK', len\(d\)\); slugs=[x['slug'] for x in d]; print\('dupes:', [s for s in set\(slugs\) if slugs.count\(s\)>1]\)")
Bash(python -c "import xml.dom.minidom as m; m.parse\('sitemap.xml'\); print\('XML OK'\)")
Bash(node -e "const t=require\('./terms.json'\); console.log\('total', t.length\); const cats={}; t.forEach\(x=>x.categories.forEach\(c=>cats[c]=\(cats[c]||0\)+1\)\); console.log\(cats\);")
